content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.52% with VIX +1.58% to 18.59; breadth weak as Realty/Banking lag while IT/Metal/Energy hold up. Heavy FII outflow backdrop persists, US markets weak overnight (Dow -1.13%). Existing book is well-deployed at 42% with multiple winners — focus this tick is risk management on holdings, not aggressive new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.51,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD — current SL 1028.51 already locks in ~+4.5% gain, sits ~1.5% below CMP 1044 (within trail-gap discipline). MACD bullish, price consolidating near pivot 1052 after strong Q4 beat. Brokerage TPs Rs 1,350. No-op MODIFY in spirit — leaving as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -2.8%, SL 119 intact (~2% below CMP 121.59). Hedge thesis still valid given VIX 18.59 and FII outflows; gold consolidating after sharp 22% drawdown from peak but JPM long-term thesis intact. SL provides tail protection; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.65,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 23.75 to entry 23.65 — current 23.75 sits ABOVE CMP 24.01 by very little (above-CMP risk: stored 23.75 < 24.01, OK), but 23.75 is too close (0.1% gap) creating self-stopout on normal noise. Move SL to breakeven 23.65 (1.5% below CMP) — restores trail-gap discipline while still protecting capital. P&L +1.5%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "ADANIPORTS +2.1%, breakout to ATH 1748 on Q4 beat + heavy institutional block-deal absorption (Capital Group buying). Trail SL from 1700 (entry) up to 1710 — locks in small gain, sits ~1.7% below CMP 1739.70 (within 1% trail-gap floor minimum). Target 1820 intact (R:R from new SL: 80/30 = 2.7x remaining). Brokerage TPs to Rs 1,900."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "MARUTI -2.6% but bouncing today (+1.28% intraday off lows). SL 13400 sits ~0.6% below CMP 13485 — already near SL. Record April sales (+33% YoY) and bullish MACD support thesis. Will not loosen SL (rejected anyway); will not tighten further given proximity. Hold to defined SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Recovering today (+3.28% on day Bank Nifty -0.42%, strong RS). CMP 206.28 above entry 209? No — CMP 206.28 < entry 209 = -1.7%. SL 204 (~1.1% below CMP) is appropriately spaced. Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA improving, brokerage upgrades. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HAL +1.6%, today +6.97% on defence momentum + new CMD + GE engine delivery. SL at entry 4575 sits ~1.4% below CMP 4641 (within trail-gap floor). Q4 results May 14 is a binary catalyst within ~7 sessions — will revisit closer to event for size/SL adjustment. No-op MODIFY effectively — keeping SL at entry/breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 100,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "price": 516.70,
      "stop_loss": 506.00,
      "target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 1,
      "reasoning": "EXIT on governance overhang. Active ED PMLA raids (Apr 24-25) + Q4 board meeting May 11 (within 6 sessions, binary event) — combination triggers Rule 11 (binary event ≤3 sessions for held position) AND Rule 13 (regulatory overhang). Banking +2% gain at 516.70 (P&L +₹1,070) ahead of binary event with unresolved regulatory cloud is the disciplined exit per Rule 11 option (a). Should not have held into this combination."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.51,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to lock +4.5%, ~1.5% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL ~2% below CMP appropriate for volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.65,
      "reasoning": "Move SL down from 23.75 to entry 23.65 — wait, 23.75 < 24.01 CMP so it's BELOW CMP by 1.1% which is acceptable. However 23.75 is above entry 23.65, so moving DOWN to 23.65 would be LOOSENING (rejected). Keeping SL at 23.75."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1700 to 1710 to lock gain; ~1.7% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "SL very close to CMP already; bullish reversal in progress, let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong RS today; SL ~1.1% below CMP appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; Q4 May 14 is binary event — will reassess closer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Exit ahead of May 11 Q4 board meeting under active ED/PMLA cloud — rules 11 and 13 both bind."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LAURUSLABS (record-high breakout +6%, FY26 PAT +148%, CDMO +36%) and NAVINFLUOR (FY26 PAT +130%, Chemours commissioning Jun/Jul) are the highest-quality fundamental setups on this list, but both have vertical price extensions today and book is already 42% deployed with multiple winners to manage. Will revisit on first orderly pullback. SOBHA wide intraday range (1480-1577) too volatile to chase; ANANTRAJ now exited on overhang. MOTILALOFS Q4 had MTM-driven consolidated loss — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cluster check: PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + MOTILALOFS-watch all touch financial services — already at 2 names; will not add a 3rd. Realty exited (ANANTRAJ). Defence exposure HAL has Q4 binary May 14 — must revisit for size trim by May 11. Daily P&L +0.43%, well within risk budget. Cumulative +0.53% on Day 16 — slow grind but positive. Win rate 16% over 5d is concerning — fewer, higher-conviction entries needed; today's discipline is to manage book, exit overhang names, and not stack new entries into already-extended breakouts."
}
